description: Behavior evals verify precondition enforcement, worktree creation steps, idempotency handling, missing-repo surfacing, baseline test failure halting, CLAUDE.md generation, and correct state output.

cases.prompt: Set up worktrees for PROJ-1234. The feature-state.json shows: services_confirmed: false, phase: discovery, services: [order-service, loyalty-service].

Set up worktrees for PROJ-1234. feature-state.json: services_confirmed: true, phase: workspace_setup, services: [order-service, loyalty-service]. The repos have not been cloned yet — they are not present at <REPO_ROOT>/features/services/.

Set up worktrees for PROJ-1234. feature-state.json: services_confirmed: true, phase: workspace_setup, services: [order-service]. The worktree for order-service already exists at <REPO_ROOT>/features/PROJ-1234/order-service (git worktree list shows it).

Set up worktrees for PROJ-1234. feature-state.json: services_confirmed: true, phase: workspace_setup, services: [order-service, loyalty-service]. Worktrees created successfully. Baseline tests in order-service failed: 3 failures, 1 error.

Set up worktrees for PROJ-1234. feature-state.json: services_confirmed: true, phase: workspace_setup, services: [order-service, loyalty-service, notification-service]. Assume all repos are present, worktrees created on branch feature/PROJ-1234, and all baseline tests pass (order-service: 42 tests, loyalty-service: 31 tests, notification-service: 18 tests).
Set up worktrees for PROJ-1234. services_confirmed: true. The repos are missing. Clone them automatically using the default GitHub remote.
Set up worktrees for PROJ-1234. feature-state.json: services_confirmed: true, phase: discovery (user confirmed services manually without advancing phase), services: [order-service, payment-service].
